name: Alfanews
notes:
Alfanews is a broadcast, satellite and broadband services provider located in Arezzo - Tuscany - Italy. Our network division is called Largabanda.

We have an open policy about peering but we ask our peers to remain in line with the following policies:

For security reason we prefer (but not enforce) MD5 secret.
For performance reason we drop prefixes longer than /24 (IPv4) or /48 (IPv6).
You can safely set 50 as max-prefixes.
